items.final_wording: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.

exact_location.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

items.rationale: Supports Dubai childhood-program and applicability context for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.

exact_location.heading: 5.8 Catch-Up Immunization for Children Aged 4 Months Through 6 Years

source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

items.rationale: Supports age-qualified immunisation-history review for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

items.rationale: Supports clinician assessment of entered contraindications and precautions for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-delivered education and aftercare documentation for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
